articles.title: Talarico says the divide is 'top vs. bottom' — then heads to one of America's richest donor enclaves - Fox News
articles.description: Texas Senate nominee James Talarico reportedly attended tech fundraisers in the San Francisco Bay Area despite his anti-corporate campaign rhetoric.
articles.content: Texas Democratic Senate nominee James Talarico, who has built a reputation for his anti-corporate rhetoric and criticism of tech, reportedly spent mid-April traveling around the San Francisco Bay Are… [+4037 chars]
